title: Rename device - new name in the Notifications
scenario: Custom device name set in Device Settings > General is not reflected in system notifications for disconnect, low battery, or firmware updates
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected Poly device to open Device Settings.
Edit the device name to a custom name (e.g., "My Poly Headset").
Trigger a system notification by disconnecting the device (e.g., turn off the headset or move out of range).
Observe the disconnect notification in the Android notification shade.
Trigger a low battery notification (e.g., let the battery drain or simulate low battery).
Observe the low battery notification in the Android notification shade.
Trigger a firmware update notification (e.g., check for firmware update in the app).
Observe the firmware update notification in the Android notification shade.
expected: All system notifications (disconnect, low battery, firmware update) display the custom device name instead of the default name.
